functions.name: modules.process_arguments
documentation: Process sys.argv to get the necessary parameters, like the database file location.

functions.name: modules.timemate.timer_archive
documentation: Archive timers by setting the status to 'inactive' for all timers with start times before today.

functions.name: modules.timemate.cli
documentation:
Time Mate: A CLI Timer Manager.

Started without any options, open a TimeMate shell.

functions.name: modules.timemate.account_add
documentation: Add a new account.

functions.name: modules.timemate.format_hours_and_tenths
documentation: Convert seconds into hours and tenths of an hour rounding up to the nearest AllowedMinutes.

functions.name: modules.timemate.list_accounts
documentation: List all accounts.

functions.name: modules.timemate.timer_add
documentation:
Add a timer. Use fuzzy autocompletion to select or create an account,
then optionally add a memo to describe the time spent.

functions.name: modules.timemate.timer_update
documentation:
Update fields (account, memo, timedelta) for a specific timer interactively.
Existing values are shown as defaults.

functions.name: modules.timemate.settings
documentation: Show application information.

functions.name: modules.timemate.list_timers
documentation: List timers. By default, shows only timers with status in ('running', 'paused').

functions.name: modules.timemate.timer_start
documentation: Start a timer.

functions.name: modules.timemate.timer_pause
documentation: Pause a timer.

functions.name: modules.timemate.report_week
documentation: Generate a weekly report for the week containing REPORT_DATE (format: YY-MM-DD).

functions.name: modules.timemate.report_month
documentation:
Generate a monthly report for the month containing a specified date.
Prompts for the month in YY-MM format.

functions.name: modules.timemate.report_account
documentation:
Generate a monthly report for accounts matching a specific name or pattern.
Prompts for account name (supports fuzzy matching) and optionally for a starting month.
If no starting month is provided, generates a report for all months.

functions.name: modules.timemate.aggregate_paths
documentation: Aggregate paths for building a tree.

functions.name: modules.timemate.build_tree
documentation: Build a Rich Tree from a dictionary where keys are paths and values are numbers.

functions.name: modules.timemate.populate
documentation: Populate the Accounts and Times tables with test data.

functions.name: modules.timemate.set_home
documentation:
Set or clear a temporary home directory for TimeMate.
Provide a path to use as a temporary directory or
enter nothing to stop using a temporary directory.

functions.name: modules.timemate.is_valid_path
documentation: Check if a given path is a valid directory.

functions.name: modules.timemate.update_tmp_home
documentation: Save the TimeMate path to the configuration file.

functions.name: modules.timemate.timer_delete
documentation: Delete a specific timer record by position.

functions.name: modules.timemate.account_merge
documentation: Merge one account into another, transferring all timers and deleting the source account.

functions.name: modules.timemate.account_delete
documentation: Delete an account and all related timer records.
